examples: Sodium stearate and sodium palmitate produced by the reaction of saponifiable oil and alkali of degreasing solution were removed by filtration.
The packing Carbonate dust from the saponifiable waste alkali incineration equipment was treated with wet dust-removing techniques of material-filled purification tower.
Olive oil has very high nutritional value, its main components are saponifiable substance and non-saponifiable substance, the percentage of saponifiable substance is 98.
